creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
lawrance    2006-10-08 06:07:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Removed files:
    sysutils/gnomesu     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    sysutils/gnomesu/files patch-Makefile.in patch-configure 
                           patch-src_Makefile.in 
                           patch-xsu.desktop.in 
  Log:
  Remove sysutils/gnomesu.  It's broken, so libgnomesu is a better choice.
  
  PR:             ports/103527
  Submitted by:   Ales Katona <almindor@gmail.com>
